styleGuide: Flat minimalist icon, 256x256, centered composition on a transparent or near-white background. Deep navy blue (#1a365d) as primary fill, with accent colors as specified per icon. Single focal symbol, clean 2-3px stroke weight where applicable, no textures, no shadows, no gradients. The icon must read clearly at both 32px and 128px. Think Material Icons or Phosphor Icons aesthetic, but slightly warmer and more human.

icons.name: reliability-excel
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: a simple round clock face with a checkmark in the center instead of clock hands. Deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the clock, fresh green (#059669) for the checkmark. Transparent background. Minimalist, no shadows, no textures. 256x256. Centered. Readable at small sizes.

icons.name: reliability-flag
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: a round clock face with a diagonal warning stripe through it. Muted red (#e53e3e) for the stripe, deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the clock. Transparent background. Minimalist, no shadows, no textures. 256x256. Centered. Readable at small sizes.

icons.name: pricing-excel
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: a simple receipt or bill with a checkmark inside it. Deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the receipt outline and lines, fresh green (#059669) for the checkmark. Transparent background. Minimalist flat design, no shadows, no gradients. 256x256. Centered.

icons.name: pricing-flag
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: a receipt with a red upward-pointing arrow coming out of it, symbolizing inflated or surprise pricing. Muted red (#e53e3e) for the arrow, deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the receipt. Transparent background. Minimalist flat design, no shadows, no gradients. 256x256. Centered. Must read clearly at 32px.

icons.name: workmanship-excel
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: a perfectly joined pipe fitting (L-shape or T-shape pipe) with a small fresh green (#059669) checkmark accent. Deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the pipe. Transparent background. Flat minimalist style, no shadows, no textures, no gradients. 256x256. Centered.

icons.name: workmanship-flag
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: a pipe with a visible crack and a single water drop falling from it, symbolizing quality issues. Muted red (#e53e3e) for the crack and drop, deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the pipe. Transparent background. Flat minimalist style, no shadows. 256x256. Centered.

icons.name: responsiveness-excel
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: a simple lightning bolt with a small fresh green (#059669) checkmark overlapping. Deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the bolt. Transparent background. Flat minimalist, no shadows. 256x256. Centered.

icons.name: responsiveness-flag
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: an hourglass tipped on its side, suggesting wasted time or delay. Muted red (#e53e3e) for the hourglass outline and sand, with a subtle deep navy blue (#1a365d) supporting detail. Transparent background. Flat minimalist, no shadows. 256x256. Centered.

icons.name: communication-excel
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: a simple speech bubble with a checkmark inside it. Deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the bubble, fresh green (#059669) for the checkmark. Transparent background. Flat minimalist, no shadows, no gradients. 256x256. Centered.

icons.name: communication-flag
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: a speech bubble with two question marks inside it. Muted red (#e53e3e) for the question marks, deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the bubble outline. Transparent background. Flat minimalist, no shadows. 256x256. Centered.

icons.name: consistency-excel
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: three identical checkmarks in a horizontal row, evenly spaced. All in fresh green (#059669). Transparent background. Flat minimalist, no shadows, no textures. 256x256. Centered.

icons.name: variance-flag
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: three vertical bars of notably different heights (tall, short, medium) suggesting uneven or inconsistent output. Amber (#d97706) color for the bars. Transparent background. Flat minimalist, no shadows. 256x256. Centered.

icons.name: platform-mismatch
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: two five-pointed stars side by side at visibly different heights, with a short amber (#d97706) diagonal stripe between them suggesting a mismatch or gap. Deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the stars. Transparent background. Flat minimalist, no shadows. 256x256. Centered.

icons.name: bbb-accredited
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: a simple ribbon-style award seal with the letters 'A+' centered on it. Deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the ribbon, gold (#eab308) accent on the seal edge. Transparent background. Flat minimalist, no shadows, no textures. 256x256. Centered.

icons.name: bbb-concerns
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: a ribbon-style award seal with a single amber (#d97706) warning stripe diagonally across it. Deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the ribbon. Transparent background. Flat minimalist, no shadows. 256x256. Centered.

icons.name: sample-warning
icons.prompt: A clean flat icon: a small dotted meter or gauge with only one out of three segments filled, suggesting a small sample size. Amber (#d97706) for the filled segment, light gray (#9ca3af) for empty segments. Transparent background. Flat minimalist, no shadows. 256x256. Centered.

icons.name: verdict-strong-hire
icons.prompt: A flat minimalist circular seal or medallion: a gold (#eab308) ring with a small laurel wreath motif on either side and a clean checkmark in the center. Deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the checkmark and wreath. Transparent background. No shadows, no gradients, no textures. 256x256. Centered. Premium trust-mark feel but still flat and clean.

icons.name: verdict-conditional
icons.prompt: A flat minimalist circular seal or medallion: a silver (#9ca3af) ring with a clean thumbs-up symbol in the center. Deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the thumbs-up. Transparent background. No shadows, no gradients. 256x256. Centered. Clean and approachable.

icons.name: verdict-caution
icons.prompt: A flat minimalist circular seal or medallion: an amber (#d97706) ring with a clean single chevron (downward caret) in the center. Deep navy blue (#1a365d) for the chevron. Transparent background. No shadows, no gradients. 256x256. Centered. Conveys caution without alarm.

icons.name: verdict-avoid
icons.prompt: A flat minimalist circular seal or medallion: a muted red (#e53e3e) ring with a clean diagonal slash across the center. White and deep navy blue (#1a365d) inner fill. Transparent background. No shadows, no gradients. 256x256. Centered. Clear warning but not aggressive.
